item_type:
+ Check list when add new 1 item

+ Check list when add new 10, 20 items at the same time
description: Testing list behavior when adding single or multiple items, including position, filtering, sorting, pagination and page focus.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Check position of item after adding
+ Check filter/sort that item
expected_result:
+ Item is placed at correct position after adding
+ Item is displayed correctly when filtering/sorting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default filter, add new item and Check item order
+ Set filter condition, add new item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ Item is placed at correct position with default filtering 
+ Item is placed at correct position when set different filtering

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default sort, add new item and Check item order
+ Set sort condition, add new item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ Item is placed at correct position with default sorting
+ Item is placed at correct position when set different sorting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default per page, add new item and Check item order
+ Set different per page, add new item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ Pagination displays correctly with default pagination
+ Pagination displays correctly when set different pagination

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Focus on page 1, add new item and Check focus page
+ Focus on middle page, add new item and Check focus page
+ Focus on end page, add new item and Check focus page
expected_result:
+ Focused page is correct as spec
(Focus on the current page or Focus on the page that item is added)

description: Testing list behavior when editing items, including position updates, filtering, sorting, and pagination handling.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Check position of item
+ Check filter/sort that item
expected_result:
+ Item is placed at correct position after editing
+ Item is displayed correctly when filtering/sorting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default filter, edit item and Check item order
+ Set filter condition, edit item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ Item is placed at correct position with default filtering 
+ Item is placed at correct position when set different filtering

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default sort, edit item and Check item order
+ Set sort condition, edit item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ Item is placed at correct position with default sorting
+ Item is placed at correct position when set different sorting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default per page, edit item and Check item order
+ Set different per page, edit item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ Pagination displays correctly with default pagination
+ Pagination displays correctly when set different pagination

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Focus on page 1, edit item and Check focus page
+ Focus on middle page, edit item and Check focus page
+ Focus on end page, edit item and Check focus page
expected_result: + Focused page is correct as spec

description: Testing list behavior when deleting single items, including filtering, sorting, and pagination updates.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default filter, delete item and Check item order
+ Set filter condition, delete item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ List displays correctly with default filtering 
+ List displays correctly when set different filtering

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default sort, delete item and Check item order
+ Set sort condition, delete item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ List displays correctly with default sorting
+ List displays correctly when set different sorting

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Set default per page, delete item and Check item order
+ Set different per page, delete item and Check item order
expected_result:
+ Pagination displays correctly with default pagination
+ Pagination displays correctly when set different pagination

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Focus on page 1, delete item and Check focus page
+ Focus on middle page, delete item and Check focus page
+ Focus on end page, delete item and Check focus page
expected_result: + Focused page is correct as spec

item_type: Check list when delete all item
description: Testing list behavior when all items are deleted, including layout and default settings.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Check layout of list
+ Check pagination of list
expected_result:
+ List displays as designed when there is no item
+ Pagination displays correctly as spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Check default filter/sort after deleting all item => add new item
expected_result: + List displays correctly with default filtering / sorting

description: Testing filter functionality including column handling and various filter combinations.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Check item in filter list with default value
+ Check item in filter list when add new column / edit column / delete column
expected_result: Name of all columns are displayed properly in filter list

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Check layout of filter list when have one column
+ Check layout of filter list when have max column

Select filter condition
+ Filter with 1 column
+ Filter with Max column
+ Filter then sort Asc -> Desc
+ Filter then sort Desc -> Asc
+ Filter then sort 1 column Asc -> Desc, 1 column Desc -> Asc
